title: Headache red-flag screening documentation
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Supports sudden onset, neurological deficit, fever, trauma, pattern change, unexplained vomiting, further investigation or referral, and structured headache-diary fields.
red_flags.rationale: Supports sudden onset, neurological deficit, fever, trauma, pattern change and vomiting context for headache red-flag screening; no decision is generated.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Supports sudden onset, neurological deficit, fever, trauma, pattern change, unexplained vomiting, further investigation or referral, and structured headache-diary fields.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, onset, peak timing, fever, trauma, cancer or immune context, pregnancy, neurological findings, examination and clinician disposition are absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for headache red-flag screening.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
